title: Prognostic value of the lung immune prognostic index in metastatic gastric cancer: a single-center retrospective cohort study.
abstract: To evaluate the prognostic significance of the Lung Immune Prognostic Index (LIPI) in patients with metastatic gastric cancer (mGC).
trial_name: Abemaciclib Combined with Endocrine Therapy for Adjuvant Treatment of HR+/HER2-, Node-Positive, High-Risk Early Breast Cancer
